bpWarnings.message: Property 'Caption' must have a label ID as its value, and 'Overview' is not a label ID.
Property 'Caption' must have a label ID as its value, and 'General' is not a label ID.

root_cause_hypothesis: Golden RE-CAPTURE run: golden_match is self-referential and carries no signal. The build dimension is the real result and it flipped from the 2026-07-06 record's succeeded=false to true - the scaffold now emits the <DataSource> sibling next to <DataGroup> on OverviewGroup, which is what the old golden was missing. Separately, BP (run for the first time on this case) shows the form is NOT BP-clean: FormPatternTemplates writes literal 'Overview'/'General' strings into the tab-page Caption properties instead of label IDs. That is a template defect, not a run defect, and it is shared by every pattern in src/utils/formPatternTemplates.ts that emits a captioned tab page - so fixing it invalidates the committed goldens for the other form-pattern cases too and needs its own re-capture cycle. Filed here rather than fixed in the re-capture. The case itself only requires a clean BUILD, which passed.
suggested_fix_area: src/utils/formPatternTemplates.ts - tab-page Caption should be a label ID (@SYS...), not literal text; ripples to the L1-form-simplelistdetails / L3-form-detailstransaction goldens
evidence_refs: xppc Contoso: Errors 0 (only the pre-existing PricingEngine ExternalReference warning)
xppbp Contoso: 2x BPErrorLabelIsText on TabPageOverview / TabPageGeneral of ConDemoNoteHeaderMaster; the other 7 warnings belong to the pre-existing ConDemoNoteHeader fixture table, not to this run
